steps.title: Place the earlier past state
steps.content: Before that points to a time earlier than the critic watching North by Northwest at last year's festival. A state that came before another past event should use the past perfect tense.

steps.title: Reject the wrong tenses
steps.content: Choice A uses present tense. Choice C uses the progressive, which does not fit a completed earlier state. Choice D uses present perfect, but the sentence is anchored in past events. The answer is B.
